items.title: Parking control tower convergence Initiative
items.description: Parking control tower convergence initiative focused on improving parking configuration & policy management, payment channel orchestration, access, permit & LPR control, enforcement & compliance workflows, and operator analytics & control tower across Operator Control Console, Parking KPI Cockpit, and Parking Operations API.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase paid session conversion rate by reducing channel inconsistency and access-to-payment mismatches.
Decrease violation resolution cycle time by introducing cleaner evidence and workflow control.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase parking platform ARR by creating a stronger operational-control story for parking accounts.

productBricks.change: Extended Parking Configuration & Policy Management with reusable tariff and permit models.
Extended Payment Channel Orchestration with cleaner consistency rules across mobile, kiosk, and partner channels.
Extended Access, Permit & LPR Control with stronger event handling and permit validation.
Extended Enforcement & Compliance Workflows with better citation evidence and exception routing.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced consolidated policy and enforcement workflows in Operator Control Console.
Introduced cross-channel yield and compliance tracking in Parking KPI Cockpit.
Introduced rule-consistent payment and access behaviors in Parking Operations API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Parking control tower convergence: validated discovery

items.title: Transit open-payment reliability Initiative
items.description: Transit open-payment reliability initiative focused on improving transit fare & open payment engine, device & validator management, transit operations telemetry, and settlement, ledger & revenue reconciliation across Transit Operations Console, Validator and Driver Device Estate, and Transit Revenue Board.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase tap success rate by reducing validation failure modes and device blind spots.
Increase fare capture rate by reducing payment exceptions and reconciliation gaps.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase processed payment volume by making open-payment rollout safer and more reliable.

productBricks.change: Extended Transit Fare & Open Payment Engine with stronger best-fare and failure-handling logic.
Extended Device & Validator Management with better field visibility and maintenance-state control.
Extended Transit Operations Telemetry with faster alerting on payment and device anomalies.
Extended Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation with clearer transport-payment exception workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced faster exception and rollout-control workflows in Transit Operations Console.
Introduced validator reliability and configuration updates in the device estate.
Introduced tap and revenue-health visibility in Transit Revenue Board.

items.title: Partner expansion foundation Initiative
items.description: Partner expansion foundation initiative focused on improving partner API, sandbox & certification, market catalog & operator rules, partner analytics & revenue reporting, automotive & in-car data services, and API gateway & developer experience across Partner APIs and SDKs, Partner Workspace, and Partner Performance Board.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to launch a new market
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease time to launch a new market by reducing partner-specific onboarding ambiguity.
Increase transaction success rate by making rules, certification, and settlement status clearer.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase ecosystem gross profit by accelerating partner launches and improving attach economics.

productBricks.change: Extended Partner API, Sandbox & Certification with clearer launch workflows and automated conformance checks.
Extended Market Catalog & Operator Rules with market-ready configuration and constraint visibility.
Extended Partner Analytics & Revenue Reporting with partner-level performance and settlement transparency.
Extended Automotive & In-Car Data Services with stronger connected-car integration patterns.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced reusable onboarding and certification flows in Partner APIs and SDKs.
Introduced launch-readiness and market catalog updates in Partner Workspace.
Introduced partner revenue and quality insights in Partner Performance Board.

items.title: City intelligence operating model Initiative
items.description: City intelligence operating model initiative focused on improving city mobility intelligence, planning, scenario & outcome modeling, operational data, KPI & analytics platform, and enterprise integration layer across City Mobility Insight Board and Mobility Intelligence Data API.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease policy experiment decision cycle by making city evidence more usable and shareable.
Decrease average parking search time by enabling faster pricing and curb-policy iteration.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase public-sector platform ARR by creating a stronger planning and policy-outcome proposition.

productBricks.change: Extended City Mobility Intelligence with common planning metrics across parking and transport.
Extended Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling with faster intervention and outcome comparison.
Extended Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform with reusable city KPI packs.
Extended Enterprise Integration Layer with reusable city-system ingestion patterns.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced shared policy, curb, and mobility dashboards in City Mobility Insight Board.
Introduced cleaner planning-data access in Mobility Intelligence Data API.
